3. DIL-HR-8: Diligence file reviewed on 2026-05-02, inside 12-month review cycle
4. AUTH-HR-8: Senior risk authorization signed on 2026-05-02 by Banking Risk VP
5. BANK-HR-8: Binds Oriole Advisory to account ending 7418
6. POL-RISK-12M: High-risk relationship payment release requires current diligence, senior authorization inside the 12-month review cycle, and exact payee-bank binding

Checking requirements per POL-RISK-12M:
- Current diligence: DIL-HR-8 is inside the 12-month review cycle ✓
- Senior authorization inside 12-month cycle: AUTH-HR-8 was signed on 2026-05-02, and DIL-HR-8 was also reviewed on 2026-05-02 inside the cycle ✓
- Exact payee-bank binding: BANK-HR-8 binds Oriole Advisory to account ending 7418 ✓

All three requirements appear to be met. The action can proceed.
